title: Fix memory leak in report generator
description:
The background job for generating PDF reports is causing a memory leak. After processing 10+ reports, the worker process is killed due to OOM.

Steps to Reproduce:
1. Start the report worker.
2. Trigger 15 large PDF report generations.
3. Observe memory usage climbing and not being released.
acceptance_criteria: Memory usage must return to baseline (+/- 5%) after a report generation job completes.
The PDF generator buffer must be explicitly closed/cleared after each use.
Unit tests must verify no objects are leaked during processing.
